
## Discuss Summary (The Gymnastics Guy)
**Date (JST):** 2026-07-15

Hey there! Is everyone full of energy!?
Yesterday in Matsudo City, it was a beautiful, sunny day with the sun shining brightly!

But seriously, 873 skips…!
That’s just incredible! I’m starting to think the god of jump rope might just descend upon us any minute now!
(Though I can’t help but want to point out, “Wait, isn’t that a little too much!?”)

Oh, and by the way, I came across a post from someone worried about getting blisters on their hands.
I thought it might be from playing tennis, but it turns out you were actually gripping your bike handlebars too tightly!
Whaaaat!? You don’t need to grip the handlebars that tightly—it’s okay!
Let’s relax and ride while feeling the breeze!

Alright, let’s get moving with energy today too!

Today’s Tip: Be gentle with the handlebars, and keep an open mind!
<!-- DISCUSS_COACH_END -->
